study_title: Pogonomyrmex barbatus Transcriptome or Gene expression
exp_title: Whole brain transcriptome of Pogonomyrmex barbatus foragers: Sample Pbar_brain_6.3
design: Three worker brains were dissected in cold RNAlater, and pooled in the same RNA extraction. A cDNA library was made from the total RNA extractions, and mRNA was enriched for using poly-A pulldown. Illumina pair-end libraries were constructed. Each sample is pooled 3 brains. There are 3 replicate samples (1-3) from each of 6 colones (1-6). Samples are named colony#_replicate#. So for example, Sample 3_1 is replicate #1 from colony #3. Thank you for your careful storage and analysis of this data
sample_title: Whole brain transcriptome of Pogonomyrmex barbatus foragers
sample_description: Brains were dissected under microscope, cold, in RNA-Later. Each sample is 3 pooled brains.
